problem id: dfd704f8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00001101 -> 00110010
  01101011 -> 10011001
  11010100 -> 00111010
  10111010 -> 10110101
  00010011 -> 01000101
  11011010 -> 00000101
  11101100 -> 11000110
  11001110 -> 01011111

query: 00111100
predicted answer: 11101110
